framework.name: CFCS Ransomware Protection Guidance
framework.name_nl: CFCS Vejledning om beskyttelse mod ransomware
framework.scope: Guidance for preventing, detecting, and responding to ransomware attacks targeting Danish organizations
framework.structure_description: Guidance organized by ransomware defense phases: prevention, detection, backup and recovery, and response.

controls.title: Email filtering against ransomware
controls.description: The organization must implement advanced email filtering that blocks executable attachments, macro-enabled documents, and known phishing patterns.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal implementere avanceret e-mail-filtrering der blokerer eksekverbare vedhaeftninger, makroaktiverede dokumenter og kendte phishing-moenstre.
controls.implementation_guidance: Bloker .exe, .vbs, .js og makroaktiverede Office-dokumenter i e-mail-gateway. Implementer sandboxing af vedhaeftninger.

controls.title: Phishing training against ransomware
controls.description: Employees must be trained regularly to identify phishing emails used to deliver ransomware.
controls.description_nl: Medarbejdere skal traenes regelmaeessigt i at identificere phishing-e-mails der bruges til at levere ransomware.

controls.title: Restriction of macros in Office documents
controls.description: Macros in Microsoft Office must be disabled by default. Only signed macros from approved publishers may be enabled.
controls.description_nl: Makroer i Microsoft Office skal deaktiveres som standard. Kun signerede makroer fra godkendte udgivere ma aktiveres.
controls.implementation_guidance: Konfigurer Group Policy til at blokere makroer i filer hentet fra internettet.

controls.title: Application control and whitelisting
controls.description: The organization must implement application whitelisting so only approved programs can run on workstations and servers.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal implementere applikationshvidlisting sa kun godkendte programmer kan koeres pa arbejdsstationer og servere.

controls.title: Software and operating system updates
controls.description: All systems must have the latest security updates installed. Critical patches must be deployed within 72 hours.
controls.description_nl: Alle systemer skal have de nyeste sikkerhedsopdateringer installeret. Kritiske patches skal udrolles inden for 72 timer.
controls.implementation_guidance: Etabler automatisk patchstyring. Prioriter patches for kendte ransomware-angrebsvektorer.

controls.title: Network segmentation against lateral movement
controls.description: The network must be segmented to prevent lateral movement of ransomware between systems and departments.
controls.description_nl: Netvaerket skal segmenteres for at forhindre lateral bevaegelse af ransomware mellem systemer og afdelinger.

controls.title: Restrict RDP and remote access
controls.description: Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP) must be restricted to approved users and encrypted via VPN. RDP ports must not be directly exposed to the internet.
controls.description_nl: Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP) skal begraenses til godkendte brugere og krypteres via VPN. RDP-porte ma ikke vaere direkte eksponeret mod internettet.
controls.implementation_guidance: Deaktiver RDP pa systemer der ikke har behov. Anvend Network Level Authentication (NLA) for alle RDP-forbindelser.

controls.title: Restrict administrator privileges
controls.description: Administrative privileges must be restricted following the principle of least privilege. Daily use of administrator accounts must be prohibited.
controls.description_nl: Administrative rettigheder skal begraenses efter princippet om mindste privilegium. Daglig brug af administratorkonti skal forbydes.

controls.title: Endpoint Detection and Response (EDR)
controls.description: The organization must implement EDR solutions on all endpoints that can detect and automatically respond to ransomware activity.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal implementere EDR-loesninger pa alle endpoints der kan detektere og automatisk respondere pa ransomware-aktivitet.
controls.implementation_guidance: Vaelg EDR med ransomware-specifikke detektionsmoduler inklusiv filadfaerdsanalyse og krypteringsdetektering.

controls.title: Anti-ransomware-specific detections
controls.description: Security solutions must be configured with specific detection rules for ransomware behavior such as mass file encryption and deletion of shadow copies.
controls.description_nl: Sikkerhedsloesninger skal konfigureres med specifikke detektionsregler for ransomware-adfaerd som massekryptering af filer og sletning af skyggekopier.

controls.title: File system activity monitoring
controls.description: Critical file servers and shared drives must be monitored for unusual file modification activity that may indicate ransomware encryption.
controls.description_nl: Kritiske filservere og delte drev skal overvaages for usaedvanlig filaendringsaktivitet der kan indikere ransomware-kryptering.

controls.title: Ransomware-resistant backup
controls.description: Backups must be protected against ransomware via offline storage, air-gapped systems, or immutable backups.
controls.description_nl: Backups skal vaere beskyttet mod ransomware via offline-lagring, air-gapped systemer eller uforanderlige (immutable) backups.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementer 3-2-1-1-0 backup-strategi: 3 kopier, 2 medietyper, 1 offsite, 1 offline/immutable, 0 fejl ved test.

controls.title: Regular recovery testing
controls.description: Recovery from backup must be tested at least quarterly with realistic scenarios including full system recovery.
controls.description_nl: Gendannelse fra backup skal testes mindst kvartalsmaeessigt med realistiske scenarier inklusiv fuld systemgendannelse.

controls.title: Segmentation of backup infrastructure
controls.description: Backup systems and backup administrator accounts must be separated from the general network and use dedicated credentials.
controls.description_nl: Backup-systemer og backup-administratorkonti skal vaere separeret fra det generelle netvaerk og anvende dedikerede adgangsoplysninger.

controls.title: Ransomware incident response plan
controls.description: The organization must have a specific incident response plan for ransomware that includes isolation, assessment, communication, and recovery.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have en specifik haendelsesresponsplan for ransomware der inkluderer isolering, vurdering, kommunikation og gendannelse.
controls.implementation_guidance: Planen skal adressere: beslutning om at betale/ikke betale, kommunikation til medarbejdere og kunder, rapportering til CFCS og politi.

controls.title: Rapid network isolation
controls.description: The organization must have the ability to rapidly isolate infected systems from the network to stop ransomware from spreading.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have evnen til hurtigt at isolere inficerede systemer fra netvaerket for at stoppe ransomwarens spredning.

controls.title: Reporting to CFCS during ransomware
controls.description: Ransomware attacks against government authorities and critical infrastructure must be reported to CFCS as soon as possible and no later than within 24 hours.
controls.description_nl: Ransomware-angreb mod statslige myndigheder og kritisk infrastruktur skal rapporteres til CFCS hurtigst muligt og senest inden for 24 timer.

controls.title: Ransomware payment policy
controls.description: The organization must have a documented policy for handling ransom demands. CFCS generally advises against paying ransom.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have en dokumenteret politik for haandtering af losepengekrav. CFCS fraraader generelt at betale losesum.

metadata.source: CFCS vejledning om beskyttelse mod ransomware
